title: BUbreakingHeadlines
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: WATCH:  London police battle epidemic of phone snatching
items.description: ABC News joined undercover police as they target thieves on high-powered bikes snatching phones.

items.title: Police credit a good Samaritan for ending a deadly shooting at a Rhode Island ice rink
The Rev. Jesse Jackson, who led the Civil Rights Movement for decades after King, has died at 84
items.description: Jackson was a major contributor to the Civil Rights Movement and helped it accomplish many of its goals.

items.title: Witkoff, Kushner set for Geneva talks on Ukraine, Iran as Trump pushes for deals
items.description: Special envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner -- U.S. President Donald Trump's son-in-law -- will lead American negotiators in Geneva, Switzerland.

items.title: Warner Bros. Discovery restarts takeover talks with Paramount Skydance
items.description: Warner Bros. Discovery said that Paramount Skydance is considering enhancing its buyout offer for the entertainment company.

items.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson, civil rights icon, dies at 84
items.description: Civil rights icon Rev. Jesse Jackson died on Tuesday morning aged 84, according to a statement released by his family.
